title: Net Music: Play List
description: The mod now includes a Net Music Player item with playlist functionality for sequential music playback.
body:
# Net Music List Mod

This mod enhances the **Net Music** with playlist functionality and portable music players.

## Features

### 🎵 Playlist System
- **Playlist Items** behave like music discs
- Can be placed in CD burners for burning
- Playable in jukeboxes
- **Click to open** the playlist interface

### 🎧 Portable Music Player
- Allows players to **directly play songs**
- Personal music playback on the go

### 🎀 Compatibility
- Fully compatible with **Touhou Little Maid** mod
- Seamless integration with existing maid functionalities
